parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_ym, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE order_data->>'substatus' = 'SHOP_FAILED') AS shop_failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS success, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE order_data->>'substatus' = 'SHOP_FAILED')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) * 100, 1) AS fail_pct FROM marketplace_order WHERE order_data->>'source' = 'yandex_market' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

WITH rate AS (SELECT rate FROM currency WHERE code = 'RUB' LIMIT 1) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DATE(mo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS orders_today, ROUND(SUM((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100) FILTER (WHERE DATE(mo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')), 2) AS eur_today, ROUND(SUM((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100) FILTER (WHERE mo.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')), 2) AS eur_30d, ROUND(SUM((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100 * r.rate) FILTER (WHERE DATE(mo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')), 0) AS rub_today FROM marketplace_order mo CROSS JOIN rate r

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hidden=false AND moderated=true AND quantity>0) AS active, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE quantity=0 AND hidden=false AND moderated=true) AS oos_visible, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE moderated=false AND hidden=false) AS pending_mod FROM marketplace

SELECT external_order_id, content->'items'->0->>'title' AS product FROM marketplace_order WHERE order_data->>'substatus' = 'SHOP_FAILED' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_ym, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE order_data->>'substatus' = 'SHOP_FAILED') AS shop_failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS success, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE order_data->>'substatus' = 'SHOP_FAILED')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) * 100, 1) AS fail_pct FROM marketplace_order WHERE order_data->>'source' = 'yandex_market' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

WITH rate AS (SELECT rate FROM currency WHERE code = 'RUB' LIMIT 1) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DATE(mo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')) AS orders_today, ROUND(SUM((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100) FILTER (WHERE DATE(mo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')), 2) AS eur_today, ROUND(SUM((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100) FILTER (WHERE mo.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')), 2) AS eur_30d, ROUND(SUM((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100 * r.rate) FILTER (WHERE DATE(mo.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND mo.status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')), 0) AS rub_today FROM marketplace_order mo CROSS JOIN rate r

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hidden=false AND moderated=true AND quantity>0) AS active, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE quantity=0 AND hidden=false AND moderated=true) AS oos_visible, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE moderated=false AND hidden=false) AS pending_mod FROM marketplace

SELECT external_order_id, content->'items'->0->>'title' AS product FROM marketplace_order WHERE order_data->>'substatus' = 'SHOP_FAILED' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
